message:
test: add regression tests for scroll blocking and flow control deadlock (#196)

- Scroll tests: verify suppressScroll clears promptly, doesn't re-block
  on unrelated state changes, and only blocks briefly during font changes
- Writer tests: verify resume fires immediately without throttle delay,
  and rapid pause/resume cycles don't get stuck
- Font-size tests: verify effect doesn't re-run on tab title/status changes

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
